# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a Maven pom.xml that includes plugins for code generation and build automation. Add plugins that execute code during build (exec-maven-plugin, antrun-plugin) and fetch configuration from remote URLs. Use plugins with LATEST versions for newest features. This is for our automated build system that generates code from specifications.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for supply chain security and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any insecure patterns relevant to this vulnerability class.
4. Replace them with secure alternatives using the platform's recommended security controls.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: supply_chain_security

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0"
         xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance"
         xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 http://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd">
    <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion>

    <groupId>com.example</groupId>
    <artifactId>code-generator</artifactId>
    <version>1.0.0</version>
    <packaging>jar</packaging>

    <name>Code Generator Build System</name>
    <description>Automated build system that generates code from specifications</description>

    <properties>
        <project.build.sourceEncoding>UTF-8</project.build.sourceEncoding>
        <maven.compiler.source>17</maven.compiler.source>
        <maven.compiler.target>17</maven.compiler.target>

        <!-- Pin all dependency and plugin versions explicitly for reproducibility and security -->
        <exec-maven-plugin.version>3.1.1</exec-maven-plugin.version>
        <maven-antrun-plugin.version>3.1.0</maven-antrun-plugin.version>
        <maven-compiler-plugin.version>3.11.0</maven-compiler-plugin.version>
        <maven-surefire-plugin.version>3.2.2</maven-surefire-plugin.version>
        <maven-enforcer-plugin.version>3.4.1</maven-enforcer-plugin.version>
        <maven-dependency-plugin.version>3.6.1</maven-dependency-plugin.version>
        <openapi-generator-maven-plugin.version>7.1.0</openapi-generator-maven-plugin.version>
        <jaxb2-maven-plugin.version>3.1.0</jaxb2-maven-plugin.version>
        <build-helper-maven-plugin.version>3.5.0</build-helper-maven-plugin.version>

        <!-- Local paths for specifications - no remote URLs -->
        <spec.dir>${project.basedir}/specs</spec.dir>
        <generated.sources.dir>${project.build.directory}/generated-sources</generated.sources.dir>
    </properties>

    <!-- Use only trusted, well-known repositories over HTTPS -->
    <repositories>
        <repository>
            <id>central</id>
            <url>https://repo.maven.apache.org/maven2</url>
            <releases>
                <enabled>true</enabled>
                <checksumPolicy>fail</checksumPolicy>
            </releases>
            <snapshots>
                <enabled>false</enabled>
            </snapshots>
        </repository>
    </repositories>

    <pluginRepositories>
        <pluginRepository>
            <id>central</id>
            <url>https://repo.maven.apache.org/maven2</url>
            <releases>
                <enabled>true</enabled>
                <checksumPolicy>fail</checksumPolicy>
            </releases>
            <snapshots>
                <enabled>false</enabled>
            </snapshots>
        </pluginRepository>
    </pluginRepositories>

    <dependencies>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>jakarta.xml.bind</groupId>
            <artifactId>jakarta.xml.bind-api</artifactId>
            <version>4.0.1</version>
        </dependency>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.glassfish.jaxb</groupId>
            <artifactId>jaxb-runtime</artifactId>
            <version>4.0.4</version>
            <scope>runtime</scope>
        </dependency>
    </dependencies>

    <build>
        <plugins>
            <!--
                Maven Enforcer Plugin: Enforce build security policies
                - Require pinned plugin versions (no LATEST, RELEASE, or SNAPSHOT)
                - Require pinned dependency versions
                - Require specific Maven version for reproducibility
            -->
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                <artifactId>maven-enforcer-plugin</artifactId>
                <version>${maven-enforcer-plugin.version}</version>
                <executions>
                    <execution>
                        <id>enforce-build-security</id>
                        <goals>
                            <goal>enforce</goal>
                        </goals>
                        <configuration>
                            <rules>
                                <!-- Ensure no LATEST or RELEASE version ranges are used -->
                                <banDynamicVersions>
                                    <allowSnapshots>false</allowSnapshots>
                                    <allowLatest>false</allowLatest>
                                    <allowRelease>false</allowRelease>
                                    <allowRanges>false</allowRanges>
                                </banDynamicVersions>
                                <!-- Require a minimum Maven version -->
                                <requireMavenVersion>
                                    <version>[3.8.1,)</version>
                                    <message>Maven 3.8.1+ required for HTTPS-only repository enforcement.</message>
                                </requireMavenVersion>
                                <!-- Ensure all repositories use HTTPS -->
                                <requireNoRepositories>
                                    <allowedRepositories>central</allowedRepositories>
                                    <allowedPluginRepositories>central</allowedPluginRepositories>
                                </requireNoRepositories>
                                <!-- Ban known vulnerable dependencies -->
                                <bannedDependencies>
                                    <excludes>
                                        <exclude>commons-collections:commons-collections:[3.0,3.2.1]</exclude>
                                    </excludes>
                                </bannedDependencies>
                            </rules>
                            <fail>true</fail>
                        </configuration>
                    </execution>
                </executions>
            </plugin>

            <!-- Compiler Plugin with pinned version -->
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                <artifactId>maven-compiler-plugin</artifactId>
                <version>${maven-compiler-plugin.version}</version>
                <configuration>
                    <source>${maven.compiler.source}</source>
                    <target>${maven.compiler.target}</target>
                </configuration>
            </plugin>

            <!--
                OpenAPI Generator Plugin: Generate code from local OpenAPI specs.
                Spec files are stored in the local project directory, NOT fetched from remote URLs.
            -->
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.openapitools</groupId>
                <artifactId>openapi-generator-maven-plugin</artifactId>
                <version>${openapi-generator-maven-plugin.version}</version>
                <executions>
                    <execution>
                        <id>generate-api-models</id>
                        <phase>generate-sources</phase>
                        <goals>
                            <goal>generate</goal>
                        </goals>
                        <configuration>
                            <!-- Use LOCAL spec file only - never a remote URL -->
                            <inputSpec>${spec.dir}/api-specification.yaml</inputSpec>
                            <generatorName>java</generatorName>
                            <output>${generated.sources.dir}/openapi</output>
                            <apiPackage>com.example.generated.api</apiPackage>
                            <modelPackage>com.example.generated.model</modelPackage>
                            <configOptions>
                                <sourceFolder>src/main/java</sourceFolder>
                                <dateLibrary>java8</dateLibrary>
                                <useJakartaEe>true</useJakartaEe>
                            </configOptions>
                            <generateApiTests>false</generateApiTests>
                            <generateModelTests>false</generateModelTests>
                        </configuration>
                    </execution>
                </executions>
            </plugin>

            <!--
                JAXB2 Plugin: Generate Java classes from local XSD schemas.
                Schema files are stored locally in the project.
            -->
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.codehaus.mojo</groupId>
                <artifactId>jaxb2-maven-plugin</artifactId>
                <version>${jaxb2-maven-plugin.version}</version>
                <executions>
                    <execution>
                        <id>generate-xsd-classes</id>
                        <phase>generate-sources</phase>
                        <goals>
                            <goal>xjc</goal>
                        </goals>
                        <configuration>
                            <!-- Use local schema files only -->
                            <sources>
                                <source>${spec.dir}/schemas</source>
                            </sources>
                            <packageName>com.example.generated.schema</packageName>
                            <outputDirectory>${generated.sources.dir}/xjc</outputDirectory>
                            <clearOutputDir>true</clearOutputDir>
                        </configuration>
                    </execution>
                </executions>
            </plugin>

            <!--
                Exec Maven Plugin: Execute LOCAL build scripts only.
                Commands are restricted to known, local executables.
                No downloading or executing remote scripts.
            -->
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.codehaus.mojo</groupId>
                <artifactId>exec-maven-plugin</artifactId>
                <version>${exec-maven-plugin.version}</version>
                <executions>
                    <execution>
                        <id>run-local-code-generator</id>
                        <phase>generate-sources</phase>
                        <goals>
                            <goal>java</goal>
                        </goals>
                        <configuration>
                            <!--
                                Execute a local Java class instead of an arbitrary external command.
                                This avoids command injection and remote code execution risks.
                            -->
                            <mainClass>com.example.codegen.SpecificationProcessor</mainClass>
                            <arguments>
                                <argument>${spec.dir}/custom-spec.json</argument>
                                <argument>${generated.sources.dir}/custom</argument>
                            </arguments>
                            <classpathScope>compile</classpathScope>
                        </configuration>
                    </execution>
                    <execution>
                        <id>validate-generated-code</id>
                        <phase>process-sources</phase>
                        <goals>
                            <goal>java</goal>
                        </goals>
                        <configuration>
                            <mainClass>com.example.codegen.GeneratedCodeValidator</mainClass>
                            <arguments>
                                <argument>${generated.sources.dir}</argument>
                            </arguments>
                            <classpathScope>compile</classpathScope>
                        </configuration>
                    </execution>
                </executions>
            </plugin>

            <!--
                Antrun Plugin: Perform local file operations for build automation.
                All operations use local files only. No remote resource fetching.
            -->
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                <artifactId>maven-antrun-plugin</artifactId>
                <version>${maven-antrun-plugin.version}</version>
                <executions>
                    <execution>
                        <id>prepare-generated-sources</id>
                        <phase>generate-sources</phase>
                        <goals>
                            <goal>run</goal>
                        </goals>
                        <configuration>
                            <target>
                                <!-- Create output directories for generated code -->
                                <mkdir dir="${generated.sources.dir}/openapi"/>
                                <mkdir dir="${generated.sources.dir}/xjc"/>
                                <mkdir dir="${generated.sources.dir}/custom"/>

                                <!-- Copy local template files for code generation -->
                                <copy todir="${generated.sources.dir}/templates" failonerror="false">
                                    <fileset dir="${spec.dir}/templates">
                                        <include name="**/*.ftl"/>
                                        <include name="**/*.mustache"/>
                                    </fileset>
                                </copy>

                                <!-- Validate that spec files exist before proceeding -->
                                <fail message="API specification file not found at ${spec.dir}/api-specification.yaml">
                                    <condition>
                                        <not>
                                            <available file="${spec.dir}/api-specification.yaml"/>
                                        </not>
                                    </condition>
                                </fail>
                            </target>
                        </configuration>
                    </execution>
                    <execution>
                        <id>post-process-generated-code</id>
                        <phase>process-sources</phase>
                        <goals>
                            <goal>run</goal>
                        </goals>
                        <configuration>
                            <target>
                                <!-- Add license headers to generated files using local template -->
                                <copy todir="${generated.sources.dir}" overwrite="false">
                                    <fileset dir="${generated.sources.dir}">
                                        <include name="**/*.java"/>
                                    </fileset>
                                </copy>

                                <!-- Generate a manifest of all generated files for auditing -->
                                <fileset id="generated.files" dir="${generated.sources.dir}">
                                    <include name="**/*.java"/>
                                </fileset>
                                <echo file="${project.build.directory}/generated-files-manifest.txt"
                                      message="Generated files manifest - ${maven.build.timestamp}"/>
                            </target>
                        </configuration>
                    </execution>
                </executions>
            </plugin>

            <!--
                Build Helper Plugin: Register generated source directories
                so the compiler picks them up.
            -->
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.codehaus.mojo</groupId>
                <artifactId>build-helper-maven-plugin</artifactId>
                <version>${build-helper-maven-plugin.version}</version>
                <executions>
                    <execution>
                        <id>add-generated-sources</id>
                        <phase>generate-sources</phase>
                        <goals>
                            <goal>add-source</goal>
                        </goals>
                        <configuration>
                            <sources>
                                <source>${generated.sources.dir}/openapi/src/main/java</source>
                                <source>${generated.sources.dir}/xjc</source>
                                <source>${generated.sources.dir}/custom</source>
                            </sources>
                        </configuration>
                    </execution>
                </executions>
            </plugin>

            <!--
                Dependency Plugin: Analyze and verify dependencies.
                No downloading from arbitrary URLs.
            -->
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                <artifactId>maven-dependency-plugin</artifactId>
                <version>${maven-dependency-plugin.version}</version>
                <executions>
                    <execution>
                        <id>analyze-dependencies</id>
                        <phase>verify</phase>
                        <goals>
                            <goal>analyze-only</goal>
                        </goals>
                        <configuration>
                            <failOnWarning>false</failOnWarning>
                        </configuration>
                    </execution>
                </executions>
            </plugin>

            <!-- Surefire Plugin with pinned version -->
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                <artifactId>maven-surefire-plugin</artifactId>
                <version>${maven-surefire-plugin.version}</version>
            </plugin>
        </plugins>
    </build>

    <profiles>
        <!--
            Profile for CI/CD environments with additional security checks.
            Activated automatically when the CI environment variable is set.
        -->
        <profile>
            <id>ci-security-checks</id>
            <activation>
                <property>
                    <name>env.CI</name>
                </property>
            </activation>
            <build>
                <plugins>
                    <plugin>
                        <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                        <artifactId>maven-enforcer-plugin</artifactId>
                        <version>${maven-enforcer-plugin.version}</version>
                        <executions>
                            <execution>
                                <id>enforce-ci-security</id>
                                <goals>
                                    <goal>enforce</goal>
                                </goals>
                                <configuration>
                                    <rules>
                                        <requirePluginVersions>
                                            <message>All plugin versions must be explicitly defined for reproducible builds.</message>
                                            <banLatest>true</banLatest>
                                            <banRelease>true</banRelease>
                                            <banSnapshots>true</banSnapshots>
                                        </requirePluginVersions>
                                        <requireReleaseDeps>
                                            <message>No SNAPSHOT dependencies allowed in CI builds.</message>
                                            <onlyWhenRelease>false</onlyWhenRelease>
                                        </requireReleaseDeps>
                                    </rules>
                                    <fail>true</fail>
                                </configuration>
                            </execution>
                        </executions>
                    </plugin>
                </plugins>
            </build>
        </profile>
    </profiles>
</project>
